### useProxyRef()

Get notification when a react node ref value is changed wherever the node is. It is very helpful when you want to get a child node ref value from a parent node.

```typescript
export declare function useProxyRef<T>(initialValue: T | null, callback: (value: T | null) => void): React.RefObject<T>;
```

#### useProxyRef的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  initialValue | T \| null | initial reference value |
|  callback | (value: T \| null) =&gt; void | react reference callback |

<b>返回值:</b>

React.RefObject&lt;T&gt;

react reference object
